pageContext.name: Eternal Descent: Sirian
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Incendium LLC are proud to present the Eternal Descent: Sirian Fine Art Lithograph Print with art by Tom Fleming, inspired by the Eternal Descent Sirian One-Shot comic!  The Eternal Descent Omnibus explores a radical take on the heavy music genre, presenting axe-wielding metal masters in a dark fantasy world as you've never seen them before.  Collect this reproduction of the watercolor painting of Sirian as he makes a final stand against Pit Lord Loki and his demonic Hellspawn to spare one mortal soul...  Limited to 100 pieces worldwide, you won't want to miss out on adding this epic print to your gallery!
